chosen_action.title: Keep post-hold-only execution-board packets from masquerading as do-now assets

why_this_action.summary: The highest-leverage move in the active hold window was to fix selector truthfulness around post-hold-only packets so the scheduled rerun re-enters on a real distribution-architecture state instead of another fake active lane.
shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: latest reasons already said the primary-repo-flat packet was post-hold only
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: the current waiting packet is blocked until short-window congestion clears
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json/.md: same-run runtime repair is explicitly allowed while Codeberg remains flat
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg adoption is still the primary gate
reddit_post_analysis_latest.json: Reddit is still not a truthful substitute lane

result.summary: Patched the selector so post-hold-only board packets stay non-truthful even when a current manual packet exists, then added regressions for both the board helper and the full selector path.

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime
from agents.marketing.distribution_lane_selector import choose_distribution_lane
now = datetime(2026, 5, 26, 2, 37, 0)
d = choose_distribution_lane(now, write_action_log=False, persist_latest_artifacts=False)
print(d.lane)
print(d.reason)
PY
